title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at TCI Express

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at TCI Express
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TCI Express. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About TCI Express:
TCI Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TCI Express!
